What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a white shirt places a white ceramic mug with blue stripes and a glass measuring cup on a black table. A bag of Gold Medal All Purpose Flour sits to the left while a bottle of Bella Tavola Olive Oil rests on the right. Hands hold a container of Edy's ice cream and caramel syrup over a horizontal water bottle. The Hershey's Cocoa container sits upright on the surface nearby.
